# Tal Paperin

> Fractional CRO and B2B sales consultant. I rebuild revenue functions and fix broken sales, fast. 30-plus B2B companies rebuilt, $20M ARR managed. Work with me three ways: fractional CRO (me, personally), fully outsourced sales via KSW Solutions, or TheDealMentor.AI for founders who want to run the motion themselves.

## Key pages
- [Tal Paperin, Fractional CRO (home)](https://talpaperin.com/): services, what I fix, case studies, engagements and pricing, contact.
- [Hebrew site](https://talpaperin.com/he/): Hebrew version of the homepage.
- [Blog](https://talpaperin.com/blog/): field notes on B2B sales, fractional CRO leadership, go-to-market and fixing broken revenue.
- [Case studies](https://talpaperin.com/case-studies): real results across startups, IoT, manufacturing, medical, retail and SaaS, on four continents.
- [Contact](https://talpaperin.com/contact): email, phone, WhatsApp, a 15-minute booking link and a contact form.

## Services
- [Fractional CRO](https://talpaperin.com/services/fractional-cro): A fractional CRO who sits in the seat and owns your revenue number, strategy, team, pipeline and forecast, without a $250K full-time hire.
- [Outsourced Sales Teams](https://talpaperin.com/services/outsourced-sales): Outsource your entire sales function. Native-speaking SDRs and AEs, senior leadership and a VP, hired, trained and managed for you by KSW Solutions.
- [Go-To-Market Strategy](https://talpaperin.com/services/go-to-market-strategy): A go-to-market strategy you can actually execute. ICP, positioning, channels, playbook and a real forecast, then I help you run it.
- [Sales Team Building and Training](https://talpaperin.com/services/sales-team-building): Build a sales team that actually closes. I hire, train and manage SDRs, AEs and BDs, and replace who can't.
- [Distributor and Channel Partner Recruitment](https://talpaperin.com/services/distributor-channel-recruitment): Open new territories through the right distributors and channel partners. I recruit, sign and manage them for the long term.
- [International Market Entry](https://talpaperin.com/services/market-entry): Break into new markets without the expensive mistakes. Market-entry strategy and execution across the US, EU, Eastern Europe and APAC.
- [B2G and Public-Sector Sales](https://talpaperin.com/services/b2g-public-sector): Win complex government and public-sector deals. RFIs, RFQs and B2G projects across the globe, run by someone who has actually closed them.
- [Contract Negotiation](https://talpaperin.com/services/contract-negotiation): Take over the negotiation and close the complex, high-value agreements. I lead the deals that move the number.
- [SaaS Sales and Go-To-Market](https://talpaperin.com/services/saas-sales): Sell SaaS to a hard B2B buyer. Positioning, motion, channel and the team, built for software companies going to market.

## Guides
- [What a Fractional CRO Actually Costs](https://talpaperin.com/fractional-cro-cost): A straight answer on fractional CRO pricing: what it costs per month, how that compares to a $250K full-time CRO, what is included, and when each level is worth it.
- [Fractional CRO vs Outsourced Sales](https://talpaperin.com/fractional-cro-vs-outsourced-sales): Fractional CRO, fully outsourced sales, or a do-it-yourself system? A straight breakdown of which fits your stage, and how to choose.
- [Fractional CRO in Israel](https://talpaperin.com/fractional-cro-israel): A fractional CRO for Israeli B2B companies selling at home and abroad. Senior revenue leadership, in Hebrew or English, without a $250K full-time hire.
- [Fractional CRO vs Hiring a VP of Sales](https://talpaperin.com/fractional-cro-vs-vp-of-sales): Tired of $30K-a-month VP of Sales hires you fire in 90 days? A fractional CRO gives you proven revenue leadership with no hiring gamble, no severance, and no lock-in.

## Hebrew (עברית)
- [Services in Hebrew](https://talpaperin.com/he/services/): Fractional CRO, outsourced sales, GTM, team building, distributors and market entry, in Hebrew.
- [International B2B sales guide (Hebrew)](https://talpaperin.com/he/challenges): the bold guide to selling B2B internationally from Israel.

## Blog posts
- [Fractional CRO vs Full-Time CRO: Which Does Your Company Actually Need?](https://talpaperin.com/blog/fractional-cro-vs-full-time-cro): A practical breakdown of when a fractional CRO beats a full-time hire, what each really costs, and how to tell which one your revenue stage calls for.
- [Leadership requires balls. Most people have let theirs atrophy.](https://talpaperin.com/blog/leadership-requires-balls): Real leadership comes from hardship, not a workshop in Bali. Why clients hire me over a safe full-time hire, and what to do if you lack it.
- [An anti-Israel org targeted me with an ad. It is a masterclass in the wrong ICP.](https://talpaperin.com/blog/an-anti-israel-org-targeted-me-with-an-ad-it): A business consultant. A Fractional CRO. A guy who spends most of his day helping companies improve sales, business development and revenue growth. A religious.
- [20 Sales Problems EVERYONE has - 1 Platform with 20 solutions.](https://talpaperin.com/blog/20-sales-problems-everyone-has-1-platform-with-20-solutions): Most B2B founders are not bad at selling. They are selling without a system.
- [Most founders completely misunderstand sales objections.](https://talpaperin.com/blog/most-founders-completely-misunderstand-sales-objections): A while back I was invited by Professor Philip Tran to teach Objection Handling to his students at the College of San Mateo in California. The lecture.
- [Most CEOs don't have a sales problem. They have a motion problem.](https://talpaperin.com/blog/most-ceos-dont-have-a-sales-problem-they-have-a): They have a motion problem. They don't know where to start... And where to go next (and how). Their Salespeople (or they themselves) are calling the wrong.
- [Costco loses money on gas on purpose. Here is the strategy.](https://talpaperin.com/blog/costco-loses-money-on-gas-on-purpose-here-is-the): THAT is the entire strategy. Across 747 stations, Costco makes a few cents per gallon. Regular gas stations make 25 to 35 cents. Lines wrap around their.

Growth is not the goal.](https://talpaperin.com/blog/sentinelone-hit-1b-in-revenue-then-laid-off-300-people): And they're laying off 300 people. Not a startup running out of money. Not a company that can't find customers. Not a company whose product doesn't work. A.

They are laying off 1,400 people. The mistake that broke them is one I see B2B founders making every quarter. Smaller scale, different.

Revenue up 14% to $541 million. A $34 million profit last year turned into a $57 million loss. Cash flow down.
